text.title: AI-Assisted Multi-Squad Quarter Retro Synthesis Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: redact-sources
step.action: Run local redaction (PII / customer names / secrets) BEFORE any LLM call.

step.name: load-dora-snapshot
step.action: Parse + compute deltas vs previous quarter; each metric carries source_row pointer.

step.name: theme-cluster
step.action: LLM clusters into ≤ 10 themes with verbatim quote IDs.

step.name: tie-incidents
step.action: Map each named incident to a theme; carry postmortem_doc locator.
